'''Qetix IV''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Dresscol system/Legends|Dresscol system]] of the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] turned it into a major [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Qetix IV Alliance base|repair base]]. Most [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] were repaired in the nearby [[Ventil system/Legends|Ventil system]]. The base only has a small number of personnel, namely starfighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and support crew.

{{Moon-stub}}
